data.current_description: Scrape a single user profile from the provided URL.
data.description_suggestion: Scrape a single user profile from the provided URL. Extracts profile information such as name, job title, company, location, and other publicly available data. Requires a valid profile URL as input. Returns structured profile data extracted from the URL.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Missing details about what input parameter is required (URL), what data is extracted, and what the response contains. data.current_description: Find the profile URL behind a single professional email address.
data.summary_suggestion: Find Profile URL from Email Address
data.description_suggestion: Discover the professional profile URL associated with a given email address. Accepts a single email and returns matching profile URLs from professional networks. Useful for identifying individuals and their online presence.
data.reasoning: Current summary is vague and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about what type of profile URLs are returned and the expected output format. Enhanced description specifies output type (profile URLs), mentions professional networks context, and explains use case for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Launch a bulk search. Each bulk search can contain up to 5000 items. Supported tasks: email-search, email-verification, domain-search.
data.description_suggestion: Launch a bulk search operation to process multiple items in a single request. Supports up to 5000 items per bulk search with task types: email-search, email-verification, or domain-search. Returns a bulk search ID for tracking and retrieving results. Processing is asynchronous; use the returned ID to fetch results via readBulkSearchFiles or readSearchItem endpoints.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks information about the asynchronous nature of bulk searches and how to retrieve results, which is critical for AI agents. Added details about return value (bulk search ID), asynchronous processing, and guidance on result retrieval endpoints to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Fetch information and stats about your bulk searches. The route is paginated.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve Bulk Search Information and Statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve information and statistics about your bulk search operations. Returns paginated results containing bulk search metadata, processing status, item counts, and completion stats. Use pagination parameters to navigate through multiple bulk searches. Useful for tracking bulk search progress and retrieving bulk search IDs for result fetching.
